improvements.name: Ditch & Rampart with Moat
improvements.dvNote: Reduce raid fate; moat adds obstacle to assault
improvements.notes: 5 librum base, +2 for moat. Reminder: DV applies regardless of Knightly Presence.

history.notes: Fumble on siege - "Damage as rolled, and lose DV value equal to the conflict roll" DV reduced to 0 for the following year. Will return post Winter 498
history.notes2:
Property Damage: Cluster of commoner's houses +1 to hatred (Landlord) 4 librum repair

Misc expense is to cover for mistake on tallying harvest income impact.
